title: 1PC Shopping Trolley on Wheels Foldable Portable Waterproof Reusable Trolley Bags with Handle for Shopping Supermarkets and Travel, Assorted Color
features: Smooth and Easy Mobility: Equipped with sturdy wheels and an ergonomic handle, this trolley glides effortlessly over various surfaces, making shopping trips in supermarkets or travel excursions hassle-free.
Waterproof Material: Crafted from quality waterproof fabric, this trolley keeps your groceries and shopping items safe from spills, rain, and moisture, ensuring your belongings stay dry and secure.

Eco-Friendly Alternative: Say goodbye to single-use bags! This foldable trolley offers a sustainable and reusable solution, helping you reduce plastic waste while making your shopping trips more eco-friendly.
Spacious Capacity: With ample room to hold all your purchases, the reusable trolley bags make carrying groceries or travel essentials easy and efficient, enhancing your shopping experience.
Compact and Foldable Design: Easily folds for convenient storage, our shopping trolley on wheels can be tucked away when not in use, saving space in your home, car, or garage.
description: Description: Make your shopping trips easier and more sustainable with our Foldable Shopping Trolley on Wheels. Designed for convenience, it easily folds for compact storage, making it perfect for home, car, or travel. Crafted from waterproof material, this trolley protects your groceries and essential items from spills and moisture, keeping them safe and dry. With its smooth-rolling wheels and ergonomic handle, you can glide through supermarkets or navigate busy streets effortlessly. Its spacious capacity allows you to carry a significant amount of items, and the reusable design promotes an eco-friendly lifestyle by reducing plastic waste. Enjoy a more convenient and responsible shopping experience with this versatile trolley on wheels. Features:. Shopping Trolley on Wheels Foldable. -Color: Assorted Color. -Material: oxford fabric. -Size: about 28x7x44 cm/11.02x2.76x17.32 inch. Note: Manual measurement, please allow slight errors in size. The colors may exist slight difference due to different screens. Package Including 1 x Shopping Trolley on Wheels Foldable
